Place vignette screenshots for `vignettes/GExPipe.Rmd` in this folder.

Recommended files:

- `step1_download.png`
- `step2_qc.png`
- `step6_de.png`
- `step9_ppi.png`
- `step15_summary.png`

Tips:

- Use PNG format.
- Keep each image roughly 1400-2000 px wide for readable text in HTML vignette output.
- Capture the main panel content for each step with sidebar visible when possible.
- Avoid sensitive/project-specific sample identifiers in screenshots used for public docs.
